body: Completed CLI lifecycle surfaces: task create/update/set-status/reopen and issue list/show/create/update/close with human and CommandResult JSON output. Added coded handling for invalid patches/values, missing records/ledgers, unmet dependencies, claim conflicts, and recovery diagnostics. Verification: 196 tests pass, typecheck/Biome clean, binary rebuilt, validate 0 errors. No SyntaxError: Unexpected end of input.
